---
title: "Lady Alderson"
---

## Lady Alderson

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

Perhaps Mary Anne (Berthon) Alderson, wife of the physician Sir James Alderson (1794-1882), Kt. 1869, and sister of the Rev. Edward Berthon, vicar of Romsey.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
